ham.subject: Transaction Alert: INR 5,000.00 Debited from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We would like to inform you that a transaction of INR 5,000.00 has been debited from your account on 08 April 2026 at 02:45 PM.

Merchant: ABC Retail Pvt Ltd
Transaction ID: 1234567890

If you recognize this transaction, no action is required. If you do not recognize this activity, please contact our support team immediately at 1800-123-456 or email support@yourbank.com.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best regards,
Your Bank

spam.subject: Important: Upcoming Zoom Meeting – Action Required
spam.body:
Hello,

This is an official notice from the Corporate IT Department. A mandatory Zoom meeting has been scheduled for all employees to discuss the new security protocols.

Date: 09 April 2026
Time: 10:30 AM IST
Meeting ID: 987 654 3210
Password: Secure123

Please join the meeting using the following link: <URL>

Your attendance is required. If you cannot attend, inform your manager immediately.

Regards,
IT Help Desk
